debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
⊢ S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length

have h1 : ∀ c ∈ S, (isInitialCall m S c = true) ∨ 
              (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true) ∨ 
              (isFinalCall m S c = true) := by
      intro c _
      by_cases hi : isInitialCall m S c = true
      · left; exact hi
      · by_cases hf : isFinalCall m S c = true
        · right; right; exact hf
        · right; left; exact ⟨hi, hf⟩
    simp only [initPart, midPart, finalPart]
    rw [← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not S (fun c => isInitialCall m S c)]
    congr 1
    rw [← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (S.filter (fun c => !isInitialCall m S c)) (fun c => isFinalCall m S c)]
    have eq1 : (S.filter (fun c => !isInitialCall m S c)).filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) = finalPart := by
      simp only [finalPart, List.filter_filter]
      apply List.filter_congr
      intro x hx
      simp [Bool.and_comm]
      intro _
      rfl
    have eq2 : (S.filter (fun c => !isInitialCall m S c)).filter (fun c => !isFinalCall m S c) = midPart := by
      simp only [midPart, List.filter_filter]
      apply List.filter_congr
      intro x hx
      simp only [Bool.and_eq_true, Bool.not_eq_true', decide_eq_true_eq]
      constructor
      · intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
        simp only [Bool.not_eq_true] at h1 h2
        exact ⟨h1, h2⟩
      · intro ⟨h1, h2⟩
        simp only [Bool.not_eq_true]
        exact ⟨h1, h2⟩
    rw [eq1, eq2]
    ring

have h1 : ∀ c ∈ S, (isInitialCall m S c = true) ∨ (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true) ∨ (isFinalCall m S c = true) := by
      intro c _
      by_cases hInit : isInitialCall m S c = true
      · left; exact hInit
      · by_cases hFinal : isFinalCall m S c = true
        · right; right; exact hFinal
        · right; left; exact ⟨hInit, hFinal⟩
    have h2 : ∀ c ∈ S, (isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) = False := by
      intro c _; simp
    have h3 : ∀ c ∈ S, (isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ isFinalCall m S c = true) → 
              ¬(¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true) := by
      intro c _ ⟨hI, _⟩ ⟨hNI, _⟩; exact hNI hI
    have h4 : ∀ c ∈ S, ((¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true) ∧ isFinalCall m S c = true) = False := by
      intro c _; simp
    rw [show initPart = S.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) from rfl]
    rw [show midPart = S.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) from rfl]
    rw [show finalPart = S.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) from rfl]
    induction S with
    | nil => simp
    | cons hd tl ih =>
      simp only [List.length_cons, List.filter_cons]
      by_cases hInit : isInitialCall m (hd :: tl) hd = true <;>
      by_cases hFinal : isFinalCall m (hd :: tl) hd = true <;>
      simp [hInit, hFinal, *] <;> omega

simp only [initPart, midPart, finalPart]
    rw [← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not S (fun c => isInitialCall m S c)]
    rw [← List.length_filter_add_length_filter_not (S.filter (fun c => !isInitialCall m S c)) (fun c => isFinalCall m S c)]
    simp only [List.filter_filter, Bool.not_eq_true, decide_eq_false_iff_not]
    ring
